bloomBoost.label: Bloom Boost
bloomBoost.desc: Flowers start at 5 value (base for all value upgrades)

freeDrones.label: Free Drones
freeDrones.desc: Start with 2 free R1s at the top and bottom of the grid

beehive.label: Beehive
beehive.desc: A beehive spawns every 30s — flowers near it yield 2× value

felix.label: Felix
felix.desc: A friendly tabby cat patrols the perimeter of your garden

fullBloom.label: Full Bloom
fullBloom.desc: Start with the field filled to max with flowers

s2Drone.label: Skydio S2
s2Drone.desc: Unlock the S2 drone — 2× base speed and harvest of the R1

luna.label: Luna
luna.desc: A tuxedo cat who can harvest your entire garden at once

whiskey.label: Whiskey
whiskey.desc: A fluffy tabby who converts flower income into skill XP
